title: More Retail Digital Technologies is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: More Retail Digital Technologies is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
More Retail Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About More Retail Digital Technologies:
More Retail Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail Digital Technologies!
